title: Hyperliquid Tap Trade Win
summary_title: BlockSwap: one-tap trading on Hyperliquid for people who hate UX friction
summary_description: Joe Blau built a Flappy Bird–style perps app. 33% of traders profitable. Live on mainnet now.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces Joe Blau and BlockSwap to the space
Joe's background: 25 years building UX, US government PKI, Amazon, Uber self-driving
Crypto journey: Bitcoin mining 2013, Ethereum 2016, dApps 2017
Discovered Hyperliquid through friend Andy at HyperFi five weeks ago
Migrated from Drift (post-hack) to Hyperliquid in two days, SDK simplicity won
BlockSwap concept: one-tap up/down trading, inspired by Flappy Bird UX
Analytics: 33% win rate (1 winner, 2 losers), vs 20-30% on regular perps
Giving away first $250k builder fees to top 100 traders as rewards
